core_mechanism: Laurent-series expansion of a meromorphic function about an isolated pole, followed by extraction and re-expression of the analytic-part expansion coefficients through integral (contour-type) representations and rapidly convergent series
brief_reason: The paper defines its central objects (the Stieltjes constants) as the expansion coefficients in the Laurent series of the Hurwitz zeta function about its pole at s=1, and its whole method consists of relating, integral-representing, and re-expanding these Laurent coefficients.
